landing.nav.loginGoogle: Sign in with Google — it's free
landing.hero.title: Stop planning your trip across 20 tabs.
landing.hero.subtitle: Flights, hotels, day-by-day itinerary, and budget tracking — all in one place.
landing.hero.startFreeGoogle: Sign in with Google — it's free
landing.problem.title: If you've done this, we get it:
landing.problem.lead: Planning a trip shouldn't be harder than the trip itself.
landing.problem.tabsDesc: comparing flights, hotels, and tours across different sites.
landing.problem.sheetsDesc: trying to organize dates, prices, and bookings.
landing.problem.forgetDesc: and finding out at the airport that you forgot to book the transfer.
landing.solution.title: One place to search, plan, and organize.
landing.solution.desc: Travelyx combines flight, hotel, tour, and attraction searches with a visual itinerary planner — all on the same platform.
landing.solution.integratedSearchDesc: Flights, hotels, tours, and attractions in one interface.
landing.solution.visualItineraryDesc: Organize everything on a day-by-day calendar — drag and drop.
landing.solution.smartAssistantDesc: Automatic itinerary suggestions based on your destination and dates.
landing.features.title: Everything you need, in one place
landing.features.lead: Search, plan, and organize — all in one place. No extra tabs, no spreadsheets, nothing forgotten.
landing.features.timelineDesc: Plan each day: schedules, weather, travel time between activities, notes, and full control. Drag items between days.
landing.features.searchDesc: Search flights, hotels, cars, and activities without leaving the app. Compare prices from hundreds of sources.
landing.features.priceDesc: Track flight and hotel prices. We'll notify you when the price drops below your target.
landing.features.collabDesc: Invite your travel companions. Edit together in real-time, vote on options, and split costs.
landing.features.exportDesc: Generate a beautiful PDF itinerary, share a public link, or sync with Google Calendar.
landing.features.alertsDesc: Schedule conflicts, nights without hotels, checklists, and budgets. We'll warn you before it becomes a problem.
landing.how.title: How it actually works
landing.how.step1Desc: Browse flights, hotels, and tours. Compare prices from the source.
landing.how.step2Desc: Organize day by day on the calendar. Drag, drop, done.
landing.how.step3Desc: Everything organized in your pocket. No spreadsheets, no stress.
landing.benefits.title: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
landing.benefits.freeDesc: No subscription, no hidden fees. Plan as many trips as you want.
landing.benefits.integratedDesc: Search flights, hotels, tours, and attractions without leaving the platform.
landing.benefits.visualDesc: See your entire trip organized by day on an intuitive calendar.
landing.benefits.globalDesc: Coverage in over 190 countries with real-time updated data.
